recommendations.title: The Collini Case
recommendations.overview: A young lawyer stumbles upon a vast conspiracy while investigating a brutal murder case.

recommendations.title: Summer Storm

recommendations.title: Krabat

recommendations.title: The Bourne Supremacy

recommendations.title: Three Colors: White
recommendations.overview: Polish immigrant Karol Karol finds himself out of a marriage, a job and a country when his French wife, Dominique, divorces him after six months due to his impotence. Forced to leave France after losing the business they jointly owned, Karol enlists

recommendations.title: The Ten Commandments: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Follows Moses leading and conducting the Hebrew people from the slavery of Egypt to the freedom towards the Promised Land according to the Ancient Testament Bible book of the Exodus. The story told like never before is faithful to the Scriptures.

recommendations.title: Colonia
recommendations.overview: A young woman's desperate search for her abducted boyfriend draws her into the infamous Colonia Dignidad, a sect nobody ever escaped from.

recommendations.title: Compadres
recommendations.overview: A disgruntled Mexican cop is forced to work with a teenage hacker to hunt down the criminals who killed his wife, and dismantle their operation.

recommendations.title: Vivre Sa Vie
recommendations.overview: Twelve episodic tales in the life of a Parisian woman and her slow descent into prostitution.

recommendations.title: Hwayi: A Monster Boy
recommendations.overview: After being kidnapped as a small child and raised by the five men who abducted him, a teenage boy is now forced to join their life in crime.
